sentences.target: 新しい首相が選ばれた。
sentences.reading: あたらしいしゅしょうがえらばれた。

translations.en: A new prime minister has been chosen.
translations.es: Se ha elegido un nuevo primer ministro.
translations.fr: Un nouveau Premier ministre a été choisi.
translations.it: È stato scelto un nuovo primo ministro.
translations.vi: Một thủ tướng mới đã được chọn.
translations.nl: Er is een nieuwe premier gekozen.
translations.hi: एक नया प्रधानमंत्री चुना गया है।
translations.id: Seorang perdana menteri baru telah dipilih.
translations.ro: A fost ales un nou prim-ministru.
translations.da: En ny premierminister er blevet valgt.

tokens.explanation: An i-adjective modifying '首相', describing that the prime minister is new.
'The prime minister', the person being chosen.
Marks '首相' as the grammatical subject (the one being chosen) in the passive construction.
Continuative (連用形) form of the passive verb '選ばれる', indicating the action of being chosen.
Auxiliary verb marking the past tense of the passive verb, making 'was chosen'.

sentences.target: 首相は会議に出席します。
sentences.reading: しゅしょうはかいぎにしゅっせきします。

translations.en: The prime minister will attend the conference.
translations.es: El primer ministro asistirá a la conferencia.
translations.fr: Le Premier ministre assistera à la conférence.
translations.de: Der Premierminister wird an der Konferenz teilnehmen.
translations.it: Il primo ministro parteciperà alla conferenza.
translations.vi: Thủ tướng sẽ tham dự hội nghị.
translations.nl: De premier zal de conferentie bijwonen.
translations.hu: A miniszterelnök részt vesz a konferencián.
translations.el: Ο πρωθυπουργός θα παραστεί στο συνέδριο.
translations.id: Perdana menteri akan menghadiri konferensi tersebut.
translations.sv: Premiärministern kommer att delta i konferensen.

tokens.explanation: The prime minister, marked as the topic of the sentence.
Topics the sentence, indicating that what follows is about the prime minister.
'Meeting', the event that the prime minister will attend.
Marks '会議' as the location or event to which the prime minister attends.
Suru-noun meaning 'attendance', serving as the base for the verb 'to attend'.
Stem of the suru-verb '出席する', indicating the action to attend.
Polite present tense auxiliary, making the verb polite and non-past.

sentences.target: 前の首相がテレビで話している。
sentences.reading: まえのしゅしょうがてれびではなしている。

translations.en: The former prime minister is speaking on television.
translations.es: El ex primer ministro habla en televisión.
translations.fr: L’ancien Premier ministre s’exprime à la télévision.
translations.de: Der ehemalige Premierminister spricht im Fernsehen.
translations.it: L'ex primo ministro parla in televisione.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位前总理正在电视上发表讲话。
translations.yue: 這位前總理正在電視上講話。
translations.pt: O ex-primeiro-ministro está falando na televisão.
translations.vi: Cựu thủ tướng đang phát biểu trên truyền hình.
translations.ar: رئيس الوزراء السابق يتحدث على التلفزيون.
translations.nl: De voormalige premier spreekt op televisie.
translations.hu: A volt miniszterelnök a televízióban beszél.
translations.hi: पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री टेलीविजन पर बोल रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ο πρώην πρωθυπουργός μιλάει στην τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Den tidligere statsministeren snakker på TV.
translations.id: Mantan perdana menteri itu berbicara di televisi.
translations.sv: Den tidigare premiärministern talar i TV.
translations.da: Den tidligere premierminister taler på tv.

tokens.explanation: Noun meaning 'previous' or 'before', used to indicate the former prime minister.
Genitive particle linking '前' and '首相' to indicate 'former prime minister'.
Refers to the prime minister, here as the former one speaking.
Marks '前の首相' as the subject performing the action of speaking.
Indicates the medium through which the former prime minister is speaking.
Marks 'テレビ' as the location or medium of the action.
Stem (連用形) of the verb '話す', used before the te-form marker.
Te-form connective particle, links the verb stem to the auxiliary 'いる'.
Auxiliary verb indicating ongoing progressive action ('is speaking').

sentences.target: 国民は首相の決定を待っています。
sentences.reading: こくみんはしゅしょうのけっていをまっています。

translations.en: The citizens are waiting for the prime minister's decision.
translations.es: Los ciudadanos esperan la decisión del primer ministro.
translations.fr: Les citoyens attendent la décision du Premier ministre.
translations.de: Die Bürger warten auf die Entscheidung des Premierministers.
translations.it: I cittadini stanno aspettando la decisione del primo ministro.
translations.zh-Hans: 民众正在等待总理的决定。
translations.yue: 啲人都等緊總理嘅決定。
translations.pt: Os cidadãos aguardam a decisão do primeiro-ministro.
translations.vi: Người dân đang chờ đợi quyết định của thủ tướng.
translations.nl: De burgers wachten op het besluit van de premier.
translations.hu: A polgárok várják a miniszterelnök döntését.
translations.hi: नागरिक प्रधानमंत्री के फैसले का इंतजार कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Οι πολίτες περιμένουν την απόφαση του πρωθυπουργού.
translations.id: Warga sedang menunggu keputusan perdana menteri.

tokens.explanation: The people (citizens), marked as the topic of the sentence.
Topics the sentence, indicating that the following action is what the citizens are doing.
Refers to the prime minister whose decision is being awaited.
Genitive particle linking '首相' and '決定', indicating possession.
The decision made by the prime minister, which is the object of waiting.
Marks '決定' as the direct object of the verb '待つ'.
Stem (連用形) of the verb '待つ', used before the te-form marker.
Te-form connective particle, links the verb stem to the auxiliary 'います'.
Polite auxiliary verb indicating ongoing action in progressive form ('are waiting').

jp: 新しい首相が選ばれた。
首相は会議に出席します。
前の首相がテレビで話している。
国民は首相の決定を待っています。
fu: あたらしいしゅしょうがえらばれた。
しゅしょうはかいぎにしゅっせきします。
まえのしゅしょうがテレビではなしている。
こくみんはしゅしょうのけっていをまっています。
en: A new prime minister has been chosen.
The prime minister will attend the conference.
The former prime minister is speaking on television.
The citizens are waiting for the prime minister's decision.
